---
title: "get_event"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_event()`

Get Single Event

## Usage

```r
get_event(
  event_ticker,
  with_nested_markets = FALSE,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `event_ticker` | Character. The event ticker (e.g., "KXHIGHNY-25FEB08"). |
| `with_nested_markets` | Logical. Include nested market data. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with complete event details, optionally including markets.

## Description

Retrieves detailed information for a specific event by ticker.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
event <- get_event("KXHIGHNY-25FEB08", with_nested_markets = TRUE)
event$title
event$markets

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other events: 
`get_event_markets()`,
`get_events()`
